content.text:
All 4 active tests pass.

🟢 Green Phase Complete:

**Result**: All tests now pass (4 passing, 31 todo)

No new logic, no premature generalization for materials/enchantment/curse modifiers - those will be driven by future tests.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
